intro: The Apium graveolens capsule, also known as the celery seed, is a small, hard, and ridged fruit that contains several seeds. It is a key component in various traditional medicine practices, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, due to its claimed health benefits and medicinal properties. The capsule is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to help with digestive issues and other health conditions.
